specific_mechanism: Byzantine iconography has strict canonical rules: Christ Pantokrator centered, hierarchical saint arrangement, specific gesture vocabulary; deviations signal heresy
llm_application: LLM output canonical-form enforcement: a meta-classifier audits generations against a learned canon of permissible outputs; deviations trigger regeneration. Hierarchy of canons per task.
novelty_claim: No published 2024-2026 LLM work formalizes iconography adversarial-coevolution mapping as proposed.
